Title: Chô kessen no makuake da!! Omee dake wa ora ga taosu
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, John Burgmeier
Plot: The battle between Goku and Frieza continues after Piccolo, Gohan, and Krillin get out of their way. Also, the entire planet begins to fall apart due to the intensity of the fighting.
